token
style
pattern

DSDS Status Definition

The lifecycle status of a design system artifact. Used across all DSDS document types to indicate maturity and readiness.

Source: common/status.schema.json

status

The lifecycle status of the artifact. Standard values: 'draft' (under development, not ready for use), 'experimental' (available but API may change without notice), 'stable' (production-ready, changes follow semver), 'deprecated' (scheduled for removal). Custom values are permitted and SHOULD be lowercase kebab-case (e.g., 'sunset', 'archived', 'beta').

string

↑ Back to top
